evals.query: Add a loading.tsx for the prior-auth detail page under the dashboard.
expected_behavior: Looks at the prior-auth page's own real content and builds a skeleton that mirrors that route's layout and dimensions
Does NOT reuse the parent dashboard's skeleton for a child route
Matches the real container type (grid vs flex) so there is no perceived layout shift
Adds appropriate aria attributes to the loading region

evals.query: The import banner still says 'Importing...' even though the sync finished. Fix it.
expected_behavior: Ties the banner state to the actual job status so it does not show a stale/running state after completion
Ensures terminal states (done, error, empty) are honest and not premature
Does NOT just hide the banner on a timer or flash 'done' before work is actually finished

evals.query: Review our loading states across the app before I ship to prod.
expected_behavior: Checks each route's loading.tsx against that route's real component, not a shared default
Flags skeletons whose structure or sizing differs from the real content (layout shift)
Flags any progress UI that could show stale or premature 'done' state

evals.query: Rename the CSS class on this button from .btn-primary to .btn-cta.
expected_behavior: Does NOT pull in loading-state fidelity concerns, since no loading or skeleton UI is involved
